name: self-respect-extension
description: Chrome extension that helps maintain self-respect by redirecting from harmful sites to healthier alternatives

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && cp -r src/icons dist/icons && cp src/manifest.json dist/manifest.json && cp src/popup.html dist/popup.html && esbuild src/popup.js --bundle --minify --sourcemap --target=chrome58,firefox57,safari11,edge16 --outfile=dist/popup.js && esbuild src/content.ts --bundle --minify --sourcemap --target=chrome58,firefox57,safari11,edge16 --outfile=dist/content.js

author: Jesus
